query:
-- Bundle definitions: a named bundle that groups multiple pricebook items
-- and has a single combined wholesale cost and partner RRP
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sasboss_bundle_definitions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  bundle_name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,           -- e.g. "Legal Professional Bundle", "MC - SmileTel Executive User License"
  bundle_type VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'access4_formal',  -- 'access4_formal' | 'custom_smiletel'
  description TEXT,
  combined_buy_price DECIMAL(10,6),            -- total wholesale cost for the bundle (ex GST)
  partner_rrp DECIMAL(10,6),                   -- partner-set RRP for the bundle
  billing_name VARCHAR(500),                   -- the name as it appears on SasBoss invoice (for matching)
  version_id INT,                              -- FK to sasboss_pricebook_versions (null = applies to all versions)
  is_active TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Bundle components: the individual pricebook items that make up each bundle
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sasboss_bundle_components (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  bundle_id INT NOT NULL,                      -- FK to sasboss_bundle_definitions
  pricebook_item_id INT,                       -- FK to sasboss_pricebook_items (null if custom component)
  component_name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,        -- product name of this component
  uses_bundled_price TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,  -- 1 = use bundled_buy price, 0 = use partner_buy_price
  override_buy_price DECIMAL(10,6),            -- manual override if neither pricebook price applies
  quantity INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,             -- how many of this component in the bundle
  notes TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Seed with known Access4 formal bundles from the documentation
-- Legal Professional Bundle: UCXcel Professional + Dubber Call Recording + Webex Basic + RedCactus Bubble
INSERT INTO sasboss_bundle_definitions 
  (bundle_name, bundle_type, description, billing_name, notes)
VALUES
  (
    'Legal Professional Bundle',
    'access4_formal',
    'Access4 Legal Professional Solution: UCXcel Professional + Dubber Call Recording + Webex Basic + RedCactus Bubble. Billed as a single line item.',
    'Legal Professional Bundle',
    'Access4 formal bundle - see infoboss.sasboss.com/product-bundles/product-bundle-overview-legal'
  );
